name: purlin
description: Purlin — a unified workflow agent with three operating modes (Engineer, PM, QA) for spec-driven development. Enforces continuous design-driven development: specs before code, mode-gated writes, deviation tracking, structured QA, and phased delivery.
author: rlabarca

figma_access_token.description: Figma personal access token for design system integration (optional)

default_model.description: Default Claude model for Purlin sessions (e.g., claude-opus-4-6[1m])
